module_info.docstring: Base class for all Hermes execution environment backends.

classes.name: BaseEnvironment
classes.docstring:
Common interface for all Hermes execution backends.

Subclasses implement execute() and cleanup(). Shared helpers eliminate
duplicated subprocess boilerplate across backends.

methods.name: execute
methods.docstring: Execute a command, return {"output": str, "returncode": int}.

methods.name: stop
methods.docstring: Alias for cleanup (compat with older callers).

methods.name: _prepare_command
methods.docstring: Transform sudo commands if SUDO_PASSWORD is available.

methods.name: _build_run_kwargs
methods.docstring: Build common subprocess.run kwargs for non-interactive execution.

methods.name: _timeout_result
methods.docstring: Standard return dict when a command times out.

functions.name: get_sandbox_dir
functions.docstring:
Return the host-side root for all sandbox storage (Docker workspaces,
Singularity overlays/SIF cache, etc.).

Configurable via TERMINAL_SANDBOX_DIR. Defaults to ~/.hermes/sandboxes/.
